label: Voter registration deadline
note: Your registration must be received by your county Board of Elections by this date to vote in the General Election.

label: Last day to request a mail ballot (online or by mail)
note: Online and mailed early-mail/absentee ballot applications must be received by this date.

label: Early voting begins
note: Nine days of early voting. Any early voting site in your borough.

label: Early voting ends
note: Last day to vote early before Election Day.

label: Last day to request a mail ballot in person
note: If you missed the online/mail deadline, you can still request in person at your county BOE office.

label: ELECTION DAY
note: General Election. Polls open 6 AM – 9 PM. Vote at your assigned poll site.

label: Mail ballot return deadline
note: Mailed ballots must be received by your county Board of Elections by this date (postmarked by Election Day).
